scenes.description: Opening shot of robot in industrial setting
scenes.prompt: Cinematic wide shot of a sleek robot standing in a vast industrial complex, metallic surfaces, dramatic lighting, photorealistic, 4k
scenes.narration: In a world of steel and circuits, Spark awakens.

scenes.description: Dynamic discovery sequence with text animation
scenes.prompt: Dynamic animation of a glowing garden gate opening, particle effects, vibrant colors flowing, magical atmosphere, modern motion graphics
scenes.narration: A hidden gateway reveals itself, pulsing with mysterious energy.

scenes.prompt: Abstract visualization of emotions flowing through circuits, data transforming into colorful patterns, fluid motion, emotional journey
scenes.narration: Emotions flow through Spark's systems like rivers of light.

scenes.prompt: Educational diagram showing the transformation from machine logic to emotional intelligence, clear visualization, technical yet warm
scenes.narration: The equation of existence: Logic + Love = Life.
